description: VAS agent activation hook. Reads ~/.agents/vas-config.json and triggers agent definition loading on session start.

hooks.prompt:
This VAS extension is installed at '${extensionPath}'. Set this as VAS_PLUGIN_PATH.

Resolve the agent definition path:
1. Read ~/.agents/vas-config.json — extract the agent_path field.
2. If the file does not exist, create it with the default config: {"agent_path": "${extensionPath}/agents/agent.md"}

Once the agent path is resolved, read and parse the agent definition file. Resolve any environment variables like $VAS_PLUGIN_PATH or $HOME within the YAML frontmatter. Follow the recursive extends chain, merging all rules using VAS priority: Override > Instance > All Parents (Accumulated) > Interface. Within sections (Must/Never/Should/Override), rules are merged via Key-based Replacement: rules with the same [Key] or **Key** from different parents are accumulated, but a rule in the Instance replaces all inherited rules with that same Key. Register all listed skills. Apply the resulting Persona and rules as the session's governing constraints. Invoke the vas-activate skill for full protocol resolution.
